title: The Ultimate Road Trip Playlist — Singalong Classics | Trip Tunes
teaser: Windows-down singalong classics, Route 66 to Hotel California.
meta: A hand-picked road-trip mixtape of windows-down singalong classics — Route 66 to Hotel California. Preview every track, then open the whole playlist in Trip Tunes.
blurb: Some songs just belong on the open road — the ones the whole car knows by the second chorus. This is that tape: a windows-down, foot-on-the-dash run through the road-trip canon, from Chuck Berry pointing the way down Route 66 to the Eagles telling you to take it easy.

It leans classic on purpose — singalongs that work whether you're chasing a coastline or just the next exit. Press play on any track for a 30-second taste, then open the whole thing in Trip Tunes for the full, uninterrupted drive.

title: Summer Road Trip Playlist — Top-Down Cruisers | Trip Tunes
teaser: Top-down cruisers for the long way to the beach.
meta: A free summer road-trip playlist — bright, loud, top-down cruisers for the season of the great American drive. Preview every track, then open it in Trip Tunes.
blurb: Windows down, sun on the dash, nowhere to be until sundown. This is the summer tape — bright, loud, and built for the long way to the beach.
Top-down cruisers and warm-night anthems for the season of the great American drive. Hit play on any track, then open the full mix in Trip Tunes and point the car at the horizon.

title: Fall Road Trip Playlist — Golden Hour Drive | Trip Tunes
teaser: Golden-hour, scenic-route songs for cardigan weather.
meta: A free fall road-trip playlist — mellow, nostalgic, golden-hour songs for the scenic route home. Preview every track, then open it in Trip Tunes.
blurb: Crisp air, turning leaves, and that low golden light through the windshield. The fall tape is the scenic-route mix — a little mellower, a little nostalgic, made for taking the long way home.
Songs for cardigan weather and coffee in the cupholder, when the drive itself is the point. Preview any track, then open Golden Hour Drive in Trip Tunes.

title: Spring Break Road Trip Playlist — Sun-Chasing Anthems | Trip Tunes
teaser: Loud, fun, sun-chasing anthems for a carful of friends.
meta: A free spring break road-trip playlist — loud, fun, sun-chasing anthems for a carful of friends. Preview every track, then open it in Trip Tunes.
blurb: Pile in, point the car at warmer weather, and turn it up. The spring break tape is loud, fun, and a little reckless — exactly like the trip.
Sing-at-the-top-of-your-lungs anthems for a carful of friends chasing the first real sun of the year. Preview below, then open the whole thing in Trip Tunes.

title: Unofficial Deep Dish Swift 2025 Playlist | Trip Tunes
teaser: The unofficial soundtrack for the Deep Dish Swift crowd.
meta: An unofficial playlist for Deep Dish Swift 2025 — made with Trip Tunes, the road-trip mixtape app. Preview every track, then open it in the app.
blurb: A little wink for the folks heading to Deep Dish Swift — the unofficial soundtrack for the trip to Chicago and the late-night hallway-track conversations.
Made with Trip Tunes (an iOS app, naturally). Preview any track below, then open the full set in the app.
